title: Summary: Turn 969
content: User requested "继续新功能开发" (continue new feature development) but goal too broad; assistant identified three concrete options (A: finish SLF4J logging refactor 70% done with remaining 3 tasks, B: implement configurable LRU cache optimization for H2KnowledgeBaseStore, C: add unit tests for ObsidianExportCommand and CliMain). No decision made yet.
